root.content: Pivoting hivefiver scope to surgical refactor operation across entire project; validating and executing metrics refactor planning

children.content: Updating scope constraints from restricted .opencode/-only to whole-project surgical refactor; then validating and executing metrics refactor plan
Validating metrics refactor plan against source code; checking Phase 1-9 accuracy and implementation feasibility
Completed: Updated scope constraints in CONTAMINATION-GUARDRAILS.md and AGENTS.md; Validated and improved metrics refactor plan with accurate current state evidence
Validate metrics refactor plan findings and delegate Phase 1 (turn_count semantics) + Phase 8 (evidence_pressure signal) fixes to hivemaker
Executing Phase 1 and Phase 8 metrics fixes in scoped files with verification after each phase.
Phase 1 and Phase 8 metrics fixes implemented; running verification and collecting evidence.
Phase 1 and Phase 8 fixes compiled; verification shows existing and new test regressions requiring Phase 9 test alignment.
Phase 1 + Phase 8 validation complete: Implementation verified correct (TypeScript passes, drift uses user_turn_count, counters restored), but 12 test failures require Phase 9 alignment
Automating full refactor plan execution: Phase 9 test alignment → Phase 2-7 systematic fixes → Final verification
Phase 9 test alignment: update tests for user_turn_count and 4-counter governance schema
